notes: Reran the previously useful v15 seed16 bitstream after v16/v17 calibration failures.
Board readback reproduced calibration and command liveness: status=0xd3, calib_seen_cycle=0x93dd, ack_count=2, write/read ACKs seen.
Data integrity still fails in the same way: read_byte=0x3d instead of expected 0xa5.
This falsifies persistent bad board state as the explanation for v16/v17 failing calibration.
